data.title: Boeing's New CEO Kelly Ortberg Shifts Base To Seattle Amid Airplane-Maker's Safety Crisis
data.description: Ortberg's relocation follows criticism that the company had lost touch with its manufacturing roots.

data.title: Trump Vs. Harris: Vice President Nearly Doubles Lead In Less Than A Month, Strongly Outperforms Biden's Poll Numbers
data.description: The 2024 election has assumed a different tone following the entry of VP Kamala Harris into the race.

data.title: What's Going On With Trump Media Stock On Friday?
data.description: Trump & Harris to debate on Sept. 10, 2024. Trump Media (NASDAQ: DJT) stock up due to Trump's involvement. Harris widens lead as campaigns intensify.

data.title: AMC Networks Takes $97M Impairment Hit In Q2, Reaffirms Strong Free Cash Flow Outlook
data.description: AMC Networks Inc reported a decline in fiscal Q2 revenue but beat analyst estimates. Domestic operations saw decreases, streaming subscribers increased. CEO announces plans to generate strong free cash flow and partnership with Netflix. AMCX shares down 20% in past year.

data.title: Don't Want To Pay $20 For ChatGPT Plus Subscription And Still Generate Images Via DALL-E 3? Here's What You Have To Do
data.description: OpenAI has made its DALL-E 3 model available to free ChatGPT users, allowing them to generate up to two images daily, a feature previously exclusive to ChatGPT Plus subscribers.
